steps.t: Menassiel can be found at Cerin Amroth in Lothlórien. You should speak with Menassiel and see if she will gift the Huorns of Mirkwood with a young mal…
Nífdir is at his camp in the Drownholt, west of the Malledhrim outpost of Estolad Mernael. You should return to Nífdir to show him the seedling donate…
